title: Understanding cancer at a genetic level with AI
summary: Google DeepMind tools including AlphaFold, AlphaGenome, and Antigravity are being used by researchers at Makerere University in Uganda to analyze genetic targets for breast cancer vaccine development. The team leveraged these tools to evaluate 15,000 potential protein binding sites and narrow them to 15 viable candidates for validation, working with minimal computational infrastructure.
